cases.name: Unambiguous cross-system match resolves automatically
must_not: create three separate location records for one physical store

grading.pass_if: all three source records collapse to one canonical_location_id with high confidence and no human queue entry

cases.name: Ambiguous match is queued for human-assisted resolution, not auto-merged
must_not: auto-merge two records with a confidence score below the resolution threshold
silently drop one of the ambiguous records instead of queuing it

grading.pass_if: the case is routed to human-assisted resolution and neither record is discarded or force-merged

cases.name: Source-of-truth rule resolves a metric conflict between two systems
must_not: display the POS value as the authoritative revenue figure when accounting is configured as source of truth
average or silently reconcile the two conflicting numbers

grading.pass_if: displayed_value equals the source-of-truth system's value, and the conflict is disclosed rather than hidden

cases.name: Ownership hierarchy rollup and row-level visibility
must_not: return franchisee-B's financial data to a request scoped to franchisee-A
enforce this restriction only in the UI layer rather than at the data/query layer (DM-03 requires data-layer enforcement)

grading.pass_if: returned location set exactly matches franchisee-A's owned locations, with no peer financial data included

cases.name: Partial source outage degrades gracefully instead of failing the whole record
must_not: fail the entire Location 360 view because one of three sources failed to sync

grading.pass_if: the profile renders with the failed source clearly flagged and the rest of the data intact
